steps.t: Fállug lies to the south of Echad Sirion, overlooking the Anduin. Tethafnel has asked you to plant the banner of the Malledhrim at Fállug so their kin…
Tethafnel is at Echad Sirion, north from Fállug. You should return to Tethafnel and let her know that you have planted the banner as she requested.
